intended_use: AI-Rad Companion Organs RT is a post-processing software intended to automatically contour DICOM CT imaging data using deep-learning-based algorithms. Contours that are generated by AI-Rad Companion O
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion Organs RT is a post-processing software intended to automatically contour DICOM CT imaging data using deep-learning-based algorithms. Contours that are generated by AI-Rad Companion Organs RT may be used as input for clinical workflows including external beam radiation therapy treatment planning. AI-Rad Companion Organs RT must be used in conjunction with appropriate software such as Treatment Planning Systems and Interactive Contouring applications, to review, edit, and accept contours generated by AI-Rad Companion Organs RT.
target_condition: Patients previously selected for radiation therapy requiring organ-at-risk contouring for treatment planning
ground_truth: Ground truth annotations established following RTOG and clinical guidelines using manual annotation
other_metrics: Median DICE score > 80% across all automatically contoured organs at risk; Median 95% Hausdorff Distance (HD) value of 2.0 mm; DICE score 0.85 (median); Comparison to predicate: DICE 0.85–0.95, HD ≤ 3.5 mm
